metadata.title: Chainless | Sovereign Digital Wealth
metadata.description: Self-custody digital wealth platform. Dollar yield, global card, and BTC-backed loans — no exchange, no custody, no seed phrase.

hero.headline: Become Chainless
hero.subheadline: Grow your wealth with full control.

philosophy.heading: Sovereign digital wealth.
philosophy.subtitle: Without the centralized custody of exchanges, without the friction of wallets.

pillars.title: We have no access to your wealth.
pillars.description: Exchanges custody your assets and you depend on their solvency. Chainless was designed outside that logic. Your assets live on the blockchain, on your key. It's not a promise. It's the architecture.
pillars.imageAlt: Architectural concrete detail with warm natural light

pillars.overline: We are not just a wallet
pillars.title: A complete financial platform, without the complexity.
pillars.description: Traditional wallets hand you 12 words and a promise: don't lose them. Chainless gives you a complete app: instant payments, card, yield, bitcoin, with built-in access recovery.
pillars.imageAlt: Interior with warm natural light coming through wide windows

yield.heading: Your wealth. Your yield.
yield.subtitle: From dollar stablecoins to liquidity pools. Every yield under your custody, every protocol audited.

protect.label: Protect
protect.title: 150+ digital assets. Under your absolute control.
protect.tokens: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana and global tokens
protect.gold: Tokenized gold, precious metal without physical custody
protect.keys: Keys generated on your device. Always.

grow.label: Grow
grow.title: Access DeFi yield.
grow.description: Audited protocols, transparent returns. In a few clicks, straight from your wallet.
grow.disclaimer: Values are illustrative only, based on past performance of smart contracts. They do not constitute a promise of yield. Updated estimates available in the app.

spend.heading: Buy dollars with zero tax and spend globally.
spend.description: USDC at the real exchange rate, no hidden spread. After conversion, the assets are yours. On the blockchain, under your key.
benefits: Instant payments via BRZ in Brazil
spend.caption: Spend USDC globally

borrow.heading: Get dollars without selling your Bitcoin.
borrow.subtitle: Deposit BTC as collateral and receive credit in USDC at 5% per year, no fixed term.

steps.label: Deposit
steps.description: Your BTC stays as on-chain collateral, always under your custody.

steps.label: Receive
steps.description: Receive credit in digital dollars, instantly.

steps.label: Keep
steps.description: Your Bitcoin keeps appreciating. You didn't sell a thing.

borrow.disclaimer: Values are illustrative only. The 5% p.a. rate and +2.4% appreciation are estimates based on past performance and market conditions. They do not constitute a promise or guarantee of results. Updated data available in the app.

security.heading: Unmatched security.
security.subtitle: Layers of protection that operate silently, so your wealth never depends on trust.

layers.title: Mandatory biometrics
layers.description: Every transaction requires biometric confirmation on your device hardware. No operation happens without your physical presence.
layers.detail: Face ID · Touch ID · Android Biometrics

layers.title: Hardware isolation
layers.description: Your key never leaves the Secure Enclave or StrongBox. Isolated from the operating system, inaccessible even to Chainless.

layers.title: Cryptographic fragmentation
layers.description: MPC splits your key into distributed fragments. No one, not even Chainless, holds it in full.

layers.title: Built-in recovery
layers.description: Recover access via Google or Apple. No seed phrases, no third-party custody, no single points of failure.

socialProof.heading: Those who are already Chainless.
socialProof.subtitle: People who chose absolute control over their digital wealth.

testimonials.quote: There are several good privacy solutions beyond BTC on LN. With Chainless you pay via Pix and acquire stables that circulate outside of control. Zero cost on acquisition.
testimonials.name: Renato Amoedo
testimonials.title: Forensic Expert, Bahia Technical Police

testimonials.quote: Privacy, self-custody, and ease of use. Chainless delivers all three without compromise.
testimonials.name: Mychel Mendes
testimonials.title: Crypto-Specialized Accountant

testimonials.quote: Liquidity pools with the ease that was missing. Finally accessible DeFi without giving up control.
testimonials.name: Ramon Cunha
testimonials.title: Crypto Investor & DeFi Educator

cta.heading: Banks hate us.
cta.description: Because we proved custody is a choice, not a requirement. Your wealth lives onchain, under your key, without asking anyone's permission.

footer.brandDescription: Self-custody digital wealth platform. Your wealth grows. Your keys stay yours.
footer.disclaimer: Chainless is a product of Notus Labs Ltda. (CNPJ 41.212.785/0001-43). It is not an institution authorized by the Central Bank of Brazil, does not custody virtual assets, and has no access to user private keys. Technology provider under art. 9, §6 of BCB Resolution No. 520/2025.

influencer.subheadline: Grow your wealth with full control.
influencer.invitePrefix: Skip the waitlist with the code from

fees.title: Fees and costs
fees.intro: All fees charged by Chainless are listed below. There are no hidden fees or additional costs.

rows.service: Other crypto transfers to external wallets

fees.gasP1: The gas fee is a cost charged by blockchain networks to process and confirm transactions. It varies according to the network and the level of congestion at the time of the operation.
fees.gasP2: Chainless, through Account Abstraction, allows you to pay the gas fee with the token being transacted — without needing to hold native tokens like ETH, SOL, or MATIC.
fees.gasP3: In practice, Chainless advances the gas fee and charges a margin on the effective transaction price to cover operational costs. The estimate is displayed on the Transaction Details screen before confirmation.

hero.subtitle: Analysis, guides and insights on self-custody, DeFi yield and the future of money.
